introSection: W Face Coaster was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Oyama Yuenchi in Oyama, Tochigi, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had an Out and Back layout.

fullText:
W Face Coaster was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Oyama Yuenchi in Oyama, Tochigi, Japan.

The ride had an Out and Back layout.

Purple track and green supports.
